mapper.select: select ifnull(sum(r.income_amount), 0) as totalActualIncome, ifnull(sum(r.cost_amount), 0) as totalCost, ifnull(sum(r.income_amount), 0) - ifnull(sum(r.cost_amount), 0) as estimatedProfit, ( select count(1) from mvp_group_customer gc where gc.payment_status in (0, 1) and gc.final_due_date <= date_add(curdate(), interval 1 day) ) as unpaidCustomerCount, ( select ifnull(sum(gc.should_pay - gc.paid_amount), 0) from mvp_group_customer gc where gc.payment_status in (0, 1) and gc.final_due_date <= date_add(curdate(), interval 1 day) ) as unpaidCustomerAmount, ( select greatest( ifnull(sum(case when fr.record_type = 2 and fr.status = 1 and fr.advance_user_id is not null then fr.amount else 0 end), 0) - ifnull((select sum(s.paid_amount) from mvp_advance_settlement s where s.settle_month = date_format(curdate(), '%Y-%m')), 0), 0 ) from mvp_finance_record fr where date_format(fr.occur_date, '%Y-%m') = date_format(curdate(), '%Y-%m') ) as staffAdvanceAmount, ( select greatest( ifnull(sum(case when fr.record_type = 2 and fr.status = 1 and fr.advance_user_id is not null then fr.amount else 0 end), 0) - ifnull((select sum(s.paid_amount) from mvp_advance_settlement s), 0), 0 ) from mvp_finance_record fr ) as staffAdvanceAmountTotal from mvp_group g left join ( select group_id, sum(case when record_type = 1 and status = 1 then amount else 0 end) as income_amount, sum(case when record_type = 2 and status = 1 then amount else 0 end) as cost_amount from mvp_finance_record group by group_id ) r on r.group_id = g.id where g.status = 1

select g.id as groupId, g.group_name as groupName, g.depart_date as departDate, g.people_count as peopleCount, g.budget_cost as budgetCost, ifnull(r.income_amount, 0) as actualIncome, ifnull(r.cost_amount, 0) as totalCost, ifnull(r.income_amount, 0) - ifnull(r.cost_amount, 0) as estimatedProfit, case when ifnull(r.cost_amount, 0) >= g.budget_cost then 2 when ifnull(r.cost_amount, 0) >= g.budget_cost * 0.9 then 1 else 0 end as budgetWarnLevel from mvp_group g left join ( select group_id, sum(case when record_type = 1 and status = 1 then amount else 0 end) as income_amount, sum(case when record_type = 2 and status = 1 then amount else 0 end) as cost_amount from mvp_finance_record group by group_id ) r on r.group_id = g.id where g.status = 1 order by g.depart_date asc

select g.id as groupId, g.group_name as groupName, g.status as status, g.depart_date as departDate, g.return_date as returnDate, g.people_count as peopleCount, g.price_mode as priceMode, g.unit_price as unitPrice, g.total_price as totalPrice, g.budget_cost as budgetCost from mvp_group g where g.id = #{groupId}
select ifnull(sum(amount), 0) from mvp_finance_record where group_id = #{groupId} and record_type = 1 and status = 1
select ifnull(sum(amount), 0) from mvp_finance_record where group_id = #{groupId} and record_type = 2 and status = 1

select gc.id as customerId, gc.customer_name as customerName, gc.phone as phone, gc.should_pay as shouldPay, gc.paid_amount as paidAmount, gc.payment_status as paymentStatus, gc.final_due_date as finalDueDate, (gc.should_pay - gc.paid_amount) as unpaidAmount from mvp_group_customer gc where gc.group_id = #{groupId} order by gc.id asc

select fr.id as recordId, fr.record_type as recordType, fr.biz_type as bizType, fr.amount as amount, fr.occur_date as occurDate, fr.payer_name as payerName, fr.advance_user_id as advanceUserId, fr.status as status, fr.voucher_url as voucherUrl, fr.remark as remark from mvp_finance_record fr where fr.group_id = #{groupId} order by fr.occur_date desc, fr.id desc
mapper.insert: insert into mvp_group( group_name, depart_date, return_date, people_count, price_mode, unit_price, total_price, budget_cost, status, remark, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{groupName}, #{departDate}, #{returnDate}, #{peopleCount}, #{priceMode}, #{unitPrice}, #{totalPrice}, #{budgetCost}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now() )

insert into mvp_finance_record( group_id, customer_id, record_type, biz_type, amount, occur_date, payer_name, advance_user_id, voucher_url, ocr_amount, status, remark, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{groupId}, #{customerId}, #{recordType}, #{bizType}, #{amount}, #{occurDate}, #{payerName}, #{advanceUserId}, #{voucherUrl}, #{ocrAmount}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now() )
mapper.update: update mvp_group_customer set paid_amount = ifnull(paid_amount, 0) + #{amount}, payment_status = case when ifnull(paid_amount, 0) + #{amount} >= should_pay then 2 when ifnull(paid_amount, 0) + #{amount} > 0 then 1 else 0 end, update_time = now() where id = #{customerId}
mapper.select: select fr.id as recordId, fr.group_id as groupId, g.group_name as groupName, fr.biz_type as bizType, fr.amount as amount, fr.occur_date as occurDate, fr.status as status from mvp_finance_record fr left join mvp_group g on g.id = fr.group_id where fr.record_type = 2 and fr.status = 1 and fr.advance_user_id = #{userId} and date_format(fr.occur_date, '%Y-%m') = #{settleMonth} order by fr.occur_date desc, fr.id desc

select fr.advance_user_id as userId, ifnull(u.nick_name, u.user_name) as userName, ifnull(sum(fr.amount), 0) as totalAdvance, ifnull(s.settledAmount, 0) as settledAmount, greatest(ifnull(sum(fr.amount), 0) - ifnull(s.settledAmount, 0), 0) as leftAmount from mvp_finance_record fr left join sys_user u on u.user_id = fr.advance_user_id left join ( select user_id, ifnull(sum(paid_amount), 0) as settledAmount from mvp_advance_settlement where settle_month = #{settleMonth} group by user_id ) s on s.user_id = fr.advance_user_id where fr.record_type = 2 and fr.status = 1 and fr.advance_user_id is not null and date_format(fr.occur_date, '%Y-%m') = #{settleMonth} group by fr.advance_user_id, u.nick_name, u.user_name, s.settledAmount order by leftAmount desc, totalAdvance desc
mapper.insert: insert into mvp_advance_settlement( settle_month, user_id, total_advance, paid_amount, left_amount, status, settle_time, operator_id, snapshot_json, remark, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{settleMonth}, #{userId}, #{totalAdvance}, #{paidAmount}, #{leftAmount}, #{status}, now(), #{operatorId}, #{snapshotJson}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now() )
mapper.select: select s.id as settlementId, s.settle_month as settleMonth, s.user_id as userId, ifnull(u.nick_name, u.user_name) as userName, s.total_advance as totalAdvance, s.paid_amount as paidAmount, s.left_amount as leftAmount, s.status as status, s.settle_time as settleTime, s.remark as remark from mvp_advance_settlement s left join sys_user u on u.user_id = s.user_id where s.settle_month = #{settleMonth} order by s.settle_time desc, s.id desc

select g.id as groupId, g.group_name as groupName, g.depart_date as departDate, count(1) as unpaidCount, ifnull(sum(gc.should_pay - gc.paid_amount), 0) as unpaidAmount from mvp_group_customer gc inner join mvp_group g on g.id = gc.group_id where gc.payment_status in (0, 1) and gc.final_due_date <= date_add(curdate(), interval 1 day) and g.status = 1 group by g.id, g.group_name, g.depart_date order by g.depart_date asc
